# PanEval

> Evaluation of AI Models.


## Concepts

### Domain

Currently, each AI model is domain-specific, which means an AI model can only do things in one specific domain, such as NLP(Nature Language Processing), CV(Computer Vision), AI Voice, etc. The domain is the most extensive picture of AI models.

### Scenario

There are many scenarios in each domain of AI models. Let's take the NLP as an example, the scenarios in NLP contain QA(Question Answering), Classification, Generation, Information Retrieval, etc.

### Task

One or more tasks need to be evaluated in each scenario. For example, the QA(Question Answering) scenario in the NLP domain may contain Common Sence, Knowledge, etc.

### Dataset

Each task has one or more corresponding datasets to be used.
